raw.message: Energy guns, lasers and rockets - equip your robot and annihilate your opponents!

hook.summary: A giant mech jumps into a canyon and immediately engages an enemy in a high-intensity firefight.
hook.visual_action: Third-person perspective of a blue and red robot jumping and firing missiles at a red-outlined enemy.

scene_flow: Robot jumps into a canyon to engage an enemy robot.
Intense exchange of missile fire and energy beams creates a smoke-filled battlefield.
Player achieves a kill and immediately pivots to target a new enemy across the river.
audience_proxy: Male gamers aged 18-35 who enjoy competitive multiplayer mech combat and tactical shooters.
